overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night. The camera moves along an elevated walkway, descends through a covered corridor with glowing advertisements, and emerges at street level to cross a neon-lit road with moderate traffic. Game engine footage featuring dense urban architecture and vibrant neon lighting against wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking city street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along an elevated glass walkway overlooking a busy neon-lit street below

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench using a device

entered.detail: transparent glass safety railing along the elevated pedestrian path
illuminated signage on the side of a modern building
tall buildings with cyan and purple neon accent lighting
glass-enclosed walkway connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked elevated walkway with glass railings overlooking a busy multi-lane street. Neon-lit skyscrapers rise on both sides while flying cars pass below. A lone figure sits on a bench to the right as the camera moves forward toward an escalator entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered escalator descent to street level

events.description: entering covered escalator area from open elevated walkway
beginning descent on the escalator to lower level

agents.ego_description: riding the escalator down from the elevated walkway into the covered lower level

entered.detail: mechanical staircase with glass sides descending to lower level
illuminated rectangular panels providing artificial lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the open walkway into a covered escalator structure, descending toward street level. The environment shifts from exposed rain to sheltered space with glowing ceiling panels above.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with digital advertising

events.description: entering fully enclosed corridor from escalator landing
passing large vertical digital billboard structure temporarily blocking view ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered corridor lined with glowing advertisements and digital screens

notable_agents.action: child in red hat walking ahead in the corridor
security guard standing near the wall

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement displaying a face with product branding
glowing grid of rectangular light panels spanning the corridor
automated retail machine with illuminated display
digital display showing video content on the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: Walking through an enclosed corridor with polished floors reflecting the glowing ceiling grid. Large digital billboards and advertisements line the walls while pedestrians walk in scattered directions. The space feels distinctly indoor and sheltered from the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with delivery truck and crosswalk

events.description: exiting covered corridor to outdoor street level
crossing the wet street between parked and moving vehicles

agents.ego_description: exiting the underpass and crossing the wet street, navigating around a parked delivery truck

notable_agents.action: large delivery truck parked at the curb
pedestrian crossing the street ahead of the camera

entered.detail: large dark-colored commercial vehicle parked at the curb
large illuminated red signage spanning across the street ahead
red emergency water fixture on the sidewalk
crossroads with traffic lights and pedestrian crossings

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered corridor back into the rain, the camera navigates around a parked delivery truck and crosses the wet street. The KENDACHI neon sign becomes visible overhead as the scene opens to the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street with neon signage

events.description: continuing straight down the center of the road between traffic
passing underneath the large KENDACHI overhead signage

agents.ego_description: walking down the center of the rain-soaked street surrounded by neon-lit skyscrapers and moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: car driving ahead in the same direction down the street

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate signage spanning the width of the street
rain-slicked black pavement reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera proceeding down the center of the multi-lane street, passing under the glowing KENDACHI sign. Wet asphalt reflects the surrounding neon lights from towering buildings while cars drive alongside and ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked elevated walkway down into a sheltered urban hub and back out into a neon-drenched street. It begins on an open walkway with glass railings overlooking flying cars and skyscrapers, moving past a lone figure on a bench toward an escalator entrance. As the camera descends, the environment shifts from the exposed rain to a sheltered interior characterized by glowing ceiling panels and polished floors reflecting digital billboards. The scene then transitions from this enclosed corridor back into the rainy night, navigating around a parked delivery truck to emerge at a wide intersection. Finally, the camera proceeds down the center of the wet asphalt street, passing under a glowing KENDACHI sign while the surrounding towering buildings reflect vibrantly on the ground.
